final_prompt.prompt:
Create an instructional diagram showing how to deploy Hermes in a Docker container and integrate it with GLMCodingPlan, presented as a clear 4-step visual guide.

Style/medium: needs a technical documentation aesthetic — references in the spirit of GitHub documentation illustrations, Docker official docs visual style, modern SaaS onboarding flows; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 4-panel vertical or horizontal step-by-step layout, each panel numbered 1-2-3-4 clearly
Subject: must include Docker container visualization, Hermes deployment elements, GLMCodingPlan integration connection
Scene/backdrop: needs a clean technical/workspace environment — exact setting is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a clear, professional instructional atmosphere — exact lighting is yours
Color palette: needs a modern tech documentation direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "1", "2", "3", "4" as clear step numbers; must include "Docker", "Hermes", "GLMCodingPlan" as labeled elements
Constraints: must show 4 distinct sequential steps, must include visual connection between Hermes and GLMCodingPlan, must be readable as an instructional diagram
Avoid: must avoid cluttered layouts that obscure the 4-step sequence, must avoid missing step numbers
